person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Isabelle de Meulan, Dame de Mayenne, Dame de Craon (c. 1148-0 May 1220) was a French noblewoman, being the daughter of Waleran de Beaumont, 1st Earl of Worcester, Count of Meulan. Isabelle married twice; firstly to Geoffroy, Seigneur de Mayenne, and secondly to Maurice II, Sire de Craon. Her eldest son Juhel III de Mayenne was a celebrated Crusader.

«b»Family«/b»
Isabelle was born in about 1148, the eldest daughter of Waleran de Beaumont, 1st Earl of Worcester, Count of Meulan, and Agnès de Montfort, Dame de Gournay-sur-Marne. She had six brothers and two younger sisters. Her father was a powerful Norman magnate with much wealth and political influence. Her paternal grandparents were Robert de Beaumont, 1st Earl of Leicester and Elisabeth de Vermandois, and her maternal grandparents were Amaury III de Montfort, Count of Evreux, and Agnès de Garlande, daughter of Anseau de Garlande, Count of Rochefort, and Beatrice de Montlhery.

«b»Marriages and issue«/b»
In 1161 Isabelle married her first husband, Geoffroy, Seigneur de Mayenne whose first wife Constance of Brittany had died in 1148.

«b»Together Geoffroy and Isabelle had:«/b»
1.) Clémence de Mayenne (died before 1209), married Robert de Sablé, Grand Master of the Knights Templar, by whom she had three children including Marguerite de Sablé, Dame de Sablé.

2.) Juhel III, Seigneur de Mayenne (1168-12 April 1220), married Gervaise de Vitré, by whom he had three children. A celebrated Crusader, he was killed in battle in 1220 at the age of fifty-two.

3.) Matilda, married Andrew de Vitre

Geoffroy died in 1169. Isabelle, aged about twenty-two, married secondly in 1170 Maurice II, Sire de Craon, the son of Hughes I, Sire de Craon.

«b»Together they had seven children:«/b»
1.) Avoise de Craon (died 1230), married Guy of Laval and Yves Le Franc.

2.) Maurice III, Sire de Craon (died after 1224), married and fathered two sons.

3.) Pierre de Craon (died before 1206)

4.) Philippe de Craon (died young)

5.) Amaury I, Sire de Craon (1175-1226), married Jeanne des Roches, the daughter of his half-niece, Marguerite de Sablé, by whom he had three children including Isabelle de Craon. This meant that Isabelle de Meulan's daughter-in-law was also her great-granddaughter.

6.) Constance de Craon, a nun at the Abbey of Clarei

7.) Agnes de Craon

Isabelle was appointed guardian of Maurice's lands and their children when he left for Jerusalem on Crusade. The Gesta Guillelm Majoris Andegavensis Episcopi names Isabelle among those present at the burial of the Bishop Guillaume on an unknown date during the reign of King Philip II of France. Her husband died 12 July 1196. Isabelle herself died on 10 May 1220 at the age of about seventy-two years. Her death occurred just a month after the death in battle of her eldest son, Juhel. She was buried in Savigny.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne於大約1140年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯時，她的父親Galeran Valeran de Beaumont37歲，母親Elizabeth De Montfort19歲。她於大約1160年與Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1220年5月10日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延享年81歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪曼其薩維尼勒-維額。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meulan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne was born about 1140, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, her father, Galeran Valeran de Beaumont, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth De Montfort, was 19. She married Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne about 1160. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 10 May 1220, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 81, and was buried in Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne est née environ 1140, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Galeran Valeran de Beaumont, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Montfort, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne environ 1160. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1220, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne um 1140 in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Galeran Valeran de Beaumont 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth De Montfort 19. Sie hat um 1160 Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1220 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne è nata il circa 1140 nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Galeran Valeran de Beaumont, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth De Montfort, aveva 19 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenneが約1140年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスで生まれた時，父Galeran Valeran de Beaumontは37歳，母Elizabeth De Montfortは19歳であった。約1160年にGeoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1220年5月10日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンで81歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサヴィグニー-レ-ヴィエウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne(이)가 대략 1140년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Galeran Valeran de Beaumont(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Montfort(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 5월 10일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 서아비그니-레-비우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Galeran Valeran de Beaumont, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Montfort, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne aproximadamente 1160. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1220, em Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne родилась около 1140 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Galeran Valeran de Beaumont было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Montfort, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne около 1160 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 10 мая 1220 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности савигни-ле-виеукс, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne nació aproximadamente 1140, en Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Galeran Valeran de Beaumont, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Montfort, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne aproximadamente 1160. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1220, en Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
